# Copilot Instructions

These instructions are loaded automatically by GitHub Copilot Chat
(in VS Code, on github.com, and in the GitHub Copilot CLI) for any
prompt issued in this repository. Keep this file **short and
focused** — see `.github/instructions/*.instructions.md` for scoped
instructions and `AGENTS.md` for general agent guidance.

> _This is a generic placeholder provisioned by `azldev`. Customize
> for your project._

## About this project

This repository uses
[**azldev**](https://github.com/microsoft/azure-linux-dev-tools) (the
Azure Linux Dev Tool) for component, package, and image workflows.
Prefer `azldev` subcommands over invoking the underlying tools
directly; see `azldev --help`.

## Quick rules for agents

- Make minimal, focused changes that fully address the request.
- Follow the conventions already present in nearby files.
- Run `azldev` for project tasks rather than calling lower-level
  tools (mock, rpmbuild, dnf, ...) directly when an `azldev`
  subcommand exists.
- Update documentation alongside code changes when behavior changes.

## Keeping this file up to date

This file was provisioned by `azldev instructions install`. Re-run
that command to refresh it in place.
